name: Telemarketing ElevenLabs Full Flow v27 userID filter

nodes.name: Normalize Start Input + Stop Flag
nodes.notes:
v26: merge webhook body/query/params/top-level; command=stop and parallel-calls work when sent as URL/query parameters. parallel-calls defaults to 1.
v27: if userID is provided in start request/querystring, add t.userID filter to Telemarketing_Outgoing_Get.

nodes.name: Build Outgoing_Get SOAP
nodes.notes: v27: if userID is provided in start request/querystring, add t.userID filter to Telemarketing_Outgoing_Get.

nodes.name: Pick Free Record
nodes.notes: v26: returns up to parallel_calls selected free records as separate items. completedOutgoing guard remains disabled by default.

nodes.name: Build Lock Status SOAP
nodes.notes: v25: supports parallel-calls=N with per-item context preserved.

nodes.name: Prepare ElevenLabs Payload
nodes.notes: v25: supports parallel-calls=N with per-item context preserved.

nodes.name: Store Active Call Mapping
nodes.notes: v25: supports parallel-calls=N with per-item context preserved.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  command: 'continue',
  internal_auto_continue: true,
  run_started_at: $json.run_started_at || $json.current_run_started_at || $json.call_started_at || new Date().toISOString(),
  BISAPI_URL: $json.BISAPI_URL || $json.business_api_url,
  ol_EntityID: $json.business_entity_id,
  ol_Username: $json.business_username,
  ol_Password: $json.business_password,
  BusinessId: $json.BusinessId,
  CampaignID: $json.CampaignID,
  userID: $json.userID,
  station_id: $json.station_id,
  agent_id: $json.agent_id,
  agent_phone_number_id: $json.agent_phone_number_id,

  parallel_calls: Number($json.parallel_calls_requested || $json.parallel_calls || 1),
  limit_count: Number($json.parallel_calls_requested || $json.parallel_calls || 1),
  crm_fetch_limit: $json.crm_fetch_limit || 100,

  auto_continue_after_callback: $json.auto_continue_after_callback,
  self_start_webhook_url: $json.self_start_webhook_url,
  default_final_status_id: $json.default_final_status_id,
  failed_start_status_id: $json.failed_start_status_id,
  elevenlabs_api_key_for_crm: $json.elevenlabs_api_key_for_crm,
  status_map: $json.status_map || {}
}) }}
